step.title: Environment readiness
step.action: Verify target environment is ready: infrastructure provisioned, scaling configured, DNS updated.

step.title: Secrets verification
step.action: Verify all required secrets and environment variables are configured in the target environment.

step.title: Database migrations
step.action: Verify database migration scripts are tested, reversible, and ready to execute.

step.title: Smoke test plan
step.action: Define the smoke tests to run immediately after deployment to verify core functionality.

step.title: Produce checklist
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with deployment checklist details.
